391 K5C K5C_MECH_DIET (K5C) Mechanically Altered Diet CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional approaches in last 7 days - mechanically altered diet. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
392 K5D K5D_SYRINGE (K5D) Syringe Oral Feeding CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional approaches in last 7 days - syringe (oral feeding). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
393 K5E K5E_THERAPY_DIET (K5E) Therapeutic Diet CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: nutritional approaches in last 7 days -
